age.Description: Age of the participant at time of testing

accuracy_3.Description: Average accuracy of the participant within 3-letter trials

accuracy_6.Description: Average accuracy of the participant within 6-letter trials

accuracy_9.Description: Average accuracy of the participant within 9-letter trials

accuracy_12.Description: Average accuracy of the participant within 12-letter trials

accuracy_15.Description: Average accuracy of the participant within 15-letter trials

MT.Description: The result of the Russian adaptation of Mental Toughness Questionnaire (Papageorgiou et al., 2018)

NfC.Description: The result of the Need for Cognition questionnary (Shepeleva et al., 2018)

PA.Description: The result of the the Russian adaptation of State-Trait Anxiety Inventory (Hanin & Spielberger, 1983)

Raven.Description: The result of the Raven's Progressive Matrices Test of the participant

SE.Description: The result of the The Russian version (Romek et al., 1996) of Self-efficacy questionnaire

hardiness.Description: The general score of the abbreviated Russian version (Osin & Rasskazova, 2013) of the Hardiness questionnaire

hardComm.Description: The result of the Commitment subscale of the Hardiness questionnaire (Osin & Rasskazova, 2013)

hardContr.Description: The result of the Control subscale of the Hardiness questionnaire (Osin & Rasskazova, 2013)

hardChall.Description: The result of the Challenge subscale of the Hardiness questionnaire (Osin & Rasskazova, 2013)

AM.Description: The result of the Achievement Motivation and Fear of Failure questionnaire (Rean et al., 2002)
